
==== function diffBtn @ 15279 ====
+cats(rows,'จัดอันดับ PS','ps')}function screenPerson(){const p=(data.ps||[]).find(x=>x.ps===state.ps)||(data.ps||[])[0];return nav()+hero((p?.ps||'-')+' · '+(p?.name||''),'รายละเอียดตามชีท',p)+`<section class='panel'><h3>หมวดทั้งหมด</h3><div class='grid'>${Object.entries(C).map(([k,n])=>`<div class='card'><b>${E(n)}</b><span>Target ${M(p?.[k]?.target)} / Actual ${M(p?.[k]?.actual)}<br>${pct(p?.[k])}</span>${meter(p?.[k]?.index)}<small>${P(p?.[k]?.index)}</small></div>`).join('')}</div></section>`}function cmpPair(c,o){if((state.cmp||'prev')==='pace'){const inc=Math.max(N(c?.actual)-N(o?.actual),0),pace=pc(c).p;return{a:inc,b:pace,d:inc-pace,ix:pace?inc/pace*100:0,oi:100,label:'เพิ่มล่าสุด'}}const a=N(c?.actual),b=N(o?.actual);return{a,b,d:a-b,ix:N(c?.index),oi:N(o?.index),label:'ล่าสุด'}}function diffBtn(cur,old,k,i){const r=cmpPair(cur[k]||{},old?.[k]||{}),cls=r.d>=0?'up':'dn',left=(state.cmp==='pace'?`เพิ่ม ${M(r.a)} / Pace ${M(r.b)}`:`ล่าสุด ${M(r.a)} / ก่อนหน้า ${M(r.b)}`);return `<button class='row' data-mode='compare' data-cat='${E(k)}' data-cmp='${E(state.cmp||'prev')}'><div class='no'>${i+1}</div><div class='rowMain'><div class='rowHead'><b>${E(C[k])}</b><em class='paceMini'>${pct(cur[k])}</em></div><span class='rowSub'>${left}</span></div><div class='right ${cls}'>${r.d>=0?'+':''}${M(r.d)}</div></button>`}function by(a,k){const m=new Map();(a||[]).forEach(x=>m.set(x[k]||x.code,x));return m}function deltas(cur,old,k,id){const om=by(old,id);return(cur||[]).map(x=>{const o=om.get(x[id]||x.code)||{},cv=x[k]||{},ov=o[k]||{},rem=Math.max(N(cv.remaining)||(N(cv.target)-N(cv.actual)),0),per=N(cv.perDay)||(dl()>0?rem/dl():rem),r=cmpPair(cv,ov);return{...x,current:r.a,previous:r.b,remaining:rem,perDay:per,diff:r.d,indexNow:r.ix,indexOld:r.oi,indexDiff:r.ix-r.oi}})}function drow(r,i,s=null){const cls=r.diff>=0?'up':'dn',tag=s?'button':'div',attr=s?` data-mode='${E(s.mode||'compare')}' data-cat='${E(s.cat||'')}' data-ads='${E(s.ads||'')}' data-cmp='${E(state.cmp||'prev')}'`:'';const txt=state.cmp==='pace'?`เพิ่ม ${M(r.current)} / Pace ${M(r.previous)}`:`ล่าสุด ${M(r.current)} / ก่อนหน้า ${M(r.previous)}`;return `<${tag} class='row'${attr}><div class='no'>${i+1}</div><div class='rowMain'><div class='rowHead'><b>${E(r.ps||r.ads||r.code)} · ${E(r.name||'')}</b><em class='paceMini'>เหลือ ${M(r.remaining)} / วันละ ${M(r.perDay)}</em></div><span class='rowSub'>${txt} / Index ${P(r.indexNow)}</span></div><div class='right ${cls}'>${r.diff>=0?'+':''}${M(r.diff)}</div></${tag}>`}function chipCat(cat,ad){return ==== function cmpSlider @ 9988 ====
)===target&&(!cur.period||!x.period||String(x.period)===String(cur.period)));if(!pick)throw Error('ยังไม่มีข้อมูลตลาดเดิมรอบก่อนในเดือนนี้');pack={pick:{...pick,reportKey:'ตลาดเดิม '+oldLabel(pick)},old:await jf(pick.path,12000)}}else if(kind==='avg3'){const picks=older.slice(0,3);if(!picks.length)throw Error('ยังไม่มีข้อมูลย้อนหลังสำหรับค่าเฉลี่ย');const packs=await Promise.all(picks.map(x=>jf(x.path,12000)));pack={pick:{reportKey:'เฉลี่ย '+picks.length+' วันล่าสุด',workdayNo:picks.map(x=>x.workdayNo).join(',')},old:avgPack(packs)}}else{const pick=older[0];if(!pick)throw Error('ยังไม่มีไฟล์วันทำงานก่อนหน้าให้เทียบ');pack={pick:{...pick,reportKey:kind==='pace'?'Pace เป้า':oldLabel(pick)},old:await jf(pick.path,12000)}}try{sessionStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(pack))}catch{}return pack}function cmpSlider(){const m=data?.meta||{},wd=N(m.workdayNo),market=((wd-1)%12)+1,round=Math.floor((wd-1)/12)+1,items=[['prev','เทียบวันก่อน','ดูแรงขยับจาก WD ก่อนหน้า'],['same','เทียบตลาดเดิม','ตลาด '+market+' รอบ '+round+(wd>12?' เทียบรอบก่อน':' ยังไม่มีรอบก่อน')],['avg3','เฉลี่ย 3 วัน','เทียบกับค่าเฉลี่ยย้อนหลัง'],['pace','Pace เป้า','เพิ่มล่าสุดเทียบต้องทำ/วัน']];return `<div class='muted'>เลือกรูปแบบการเทียบ</div><div class='cmpSlider'>${items.map(([k,t,d])=>`<button class='cmpCard ${state.cmp===k?'on':''}' data-mode='compare' data-cmp='${k}' data-cat='${E(state.cat||'')}' data-ads='${E(state.ads||'')}'><b>${E(t)}</b><span>${E(d)}</span></button>`).join('')}</div>`}function meter(v){return `<div class='meter'><div class='fill' style='width:${Math.max(0,Math.min(140,N(v)))}%'></div></div>`}function kpis(r){const s=r?.sales||{},x=pc(s);return `<div class='kpis'><div class='kpi'><span>Target</span><b>${M(s.target)}</b><small>ยอดขาย</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>Actual</span><b>${M(s.actual)}</b><small>ยอดขาย</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>เหลือเป้า</span><b>${M(x.r)}</b><small>ยอดขาย</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>ต้องทำ/วัน</span><b>${M(x.p)}</b><small>เหลือ ${M(x.d)} วัน</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>Index</span><b>${P(s.index)}</b><small>ตามชีท</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>GIV</span><b>${M(r?.giv?.actual)}</b><small>${pct(r?.giv)}</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>บิล</span><b>${M(r?.bills?.actual)}</b><small>${pct(r?.bills)}</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>DGP</span><b>${M(r?.dgp?.actual)}</b><small>${pct(r?.dgp)}</small></div></div>`}function hero(t,sub,r){return `<section class='panel fade'><div class='title'>${E(t)}</div><div class='muted'>${E(sub)}</div>${kpis(r||{})}</section>`}function sum(rows,code){const r={code,name:cod

oldPack(state.cmp||'prev')}catch(e){app.innerHTML=nav()+`<section class='panel'><div class='empty'>${E(e.message)}</div></section>`;return}const prev=oldLabel(p.pick),cat=state.cat in C?state.cat:'';if(!cat){app.innerHTML=nav()+hero('เทียบย้อนหลัง','ล่าสุด '+(data.meta?.reportKey||'')+' เทียบกับ '+prev,data.ds)+`<section class='panel'><h3>DS Compare</h3>${cmpSlider()}<div class='rank'>${Object.keys(C).map((k,i)=>diffBtn(data.ds,p.old.ds||{},k,i)).join('')}</div></section>`;return}const adsRows=deltas(data.ads,p.old.ads,cat,'ads').sort((a,b)=>b.diff-a.diff),adsList=adsRows.map(x=>x.ads||x.code).filter(Boolean),sel=state.ads&&adsList.includes(state.ads)?state.ads:'',dsNow=data.ds?.[cat]||{},dsOld=p.old.ds?.[cat]||{},dsDiff=N(dsNow.actual)-N(dsOld.actual),x=pc(dsNow);if(sel){const curPs=(data.ps||[]).filter(x=>x.ads===sel),oldPs=(p.old.ps||[]).filter(x=>x.ads===sel),rows=deltas(curPs,oldPs,cat,'ps'),up=[...rows].sort((a,b)=>b.diff-a.diff),down=[...rows].sort((a,b)=>a.diff-b.diff),curAds=(data.ads||[]).find(x=>(x.ads||x.code)===sel)||sum(curPs,sel),oldAds=(p.old.ads||[]).find(x=>(x.ads||x.code)===sel)||sum(oldPs,sel),aNow=curAds[cat]||{},aOld=oldAds[cat]||{},aDiff=N(aNow.actual)-N(aOld.actual),ap=pc(aNow);app.innerHTML=nav()+`<section class='panel fade'><button class='chip' data-mode='compare' data-cat='${E(cat)}' data-cmp='${E(state.cmp||'prev')}'>← กลับรายละเอียด ${E(C[cat])}</button><div class='title'>${E(sel)} · ${E(C[cat])}</div><div class='muted'>ล่าสุด ${E(data.meta?.reportKey||'')} เทียบกับ ${E(prev)}</div>${cmpSlider()}${chipCat(cat,sel)}${chipAds(adsList,cat,sel)}<div class='kpis'><div class='kpi'><span>ADS ล่าสุด</span><b>${M(aNow.actual)}</b><small>${E(sel)}</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>ADS ก่อนหน้า</span><b>${M(aOld.actual)}</b><small>${E(sel)}</small></div><div class='kpi'><span>ADS เพิ่ม/ลด</span><b class='${aDiff>=0?'up':'dn'}'>${aDiff>=0?'+':''}${M(aDiff)}</b><small>รวมทีม</small></div><div
